tagline: Same-Day Garage Door Repair. Cambridge to Boston. No Excuses.
hero_subtitle: Over a decade of expert garage door repair, installation, and opener service across Greater Boston. Open 7 days a week with no extra charge for evenings or weekends.
service_area_description: Serving Cambridge, Boston, Brookline, Malden, Somerville, and surrounding communities across Greater Boston.
seo_title: Garage Doors of Boston | Same-Day Garage Door Repair in Cambridge, MA
seo_description: Garage Doors of Boston — same-day garage door repair, installation, and opener service in Cambridge and Greater Boston. Open 7 days. No extra charge for evenings or weekends.
services_subtitle: From broken springs to full replacements — quality garage door service 7 days a week, no evening or weekend surcharges.
reviews_subtitle: Over a decade of keeping Boston-area garages running smoothly and safely.
cta_heading: Garage door won't open? Don't wait.
cta_subtitle: Call us 7 days a week or book a free estimate. Same-day service, no surprise charges.
footer_description: Expert garage door repair, installation, and opener service serving Cambridge and Greater Boston. Open 7 days a week. Over a decade of experience.

services_featured.name: Garage Door Repair
services_featured.description: Same-day repair for broken springs, cables, panels, and openers. Our experienced technicians arrive fast and fix it right the first time.

services_secondary.name: Automatic Door Installation
services_secondary.description: Upgrade from manual to automatic with a professionally installed garage door opener. We work with top brands to ensure quiet, reliable operation.

services_accent.name: Opener Replacement & Repair
services_accent.description: Garage door opener grinding, stalling, or dead? We repair and replace all major brands with same-day availability.

services_wide.name: Commercial Garage Doors
services_wide.description: Roll-up doors, sectional doors, and high-speed commercial doors for businesses across Greater Boston. Installation, service, and emergency repair.

about_features.title: Experienced Technicians
about_features.description: Over a decade of hands-on expertise. Our team has mastered their craft serving thousands of happy customers across Boston.

about_features.title: 7 Days a Week — No Surcharges
about_features.description: Open Monday through Sunday. We never charge extra for evening or weekend appointments.

about_features.title: Quality Brands Only
about_features.description: We work exclusively with top-tier brands so every installation and repair lasts for years to come.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Called in the morning, technician was here by lunch. Replaced a broken spring and the door works perfectly. No pressure, fair price. Will use again.

reviews.name: Property Manager
reviews.text: We manage several properties and use Garage Doors of Boston for all our garage door needs. Reliable, professional, and always on time.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Converted our manual garage door to automatic. The installation was clean, the opener is whisper-quiet, and the price was very reasonable.
